## Summary
<!-- 1–3 bullets explaining the change and why it's needed. -->

-
-

## Linked issues
<!-- Closes #123 / Refs #456 -->

## Type of change
- [ ] `feat`: new feature
- [ ] `fix`: bug fix
- [ ] `refactor`: non-behavioural change
- [ ] `docs`: documentation only
- [ ] `test`: test-only change
- [ ] `chore`: build / CI / tooling
- [ ] `perf`: performance
- [ ] `breaking` change (note migration steps in the body)

## Test plan
<!-- Exactly what you did locally to validate the change. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy` passes (or justified inline)
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added / updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated docs / README / SETUP where relevant
